title: MaxTronic Direct Charging Remote Control Car for Kids, Amphibious RC Cars Toy 2.4G 360° Flips Rotation 15KM/H 4WD All Terrain Stunt Car with Ajustable LED for Boys Girls 3-12 Years Old
features: 【USB Type-C Direct Charging】Our remote control cars are powered by a built-in 3.7V 600mAh battery, allowing for rapid charging using a USB-C cable. Conveniently plug in and charge with ease. The automatic sleep feature conserves power, ensuring prolonged battery life.

【Adjustable Cool LED Lights】Day or night, our remote control cars feature eye-catching LED lights that instantly grab children's attention. Plus, you have the flexibility to switch the lights on or off for added excitement during play.

【Versatile Amphibious 4WD】Boasting an IP68 waterproof sealed design, our RC car effortlessly glides on water, promising endless fun for your kids. This adaptable vehicle conquers all terrains: land, water, grass, and even carpet!

【Dynamic Stunts】Experience the thrill of 360° rotation, 180° flips, and high-speed maneuvers with our powerful motor stunt car, offering an immersive driving experience. Its stability prevents flipping, boosting children's confidence during play.

【Easy Controls for Group Fun】Designed with simplified remote control suitable for children, our Remote controlled toy car is perfect for kids aged 3-12. Enjoy multiplayer action with 2.4G signal interference-free technology. The auto demo function helps beginners quickly master all the cool stunts.
description: Product Description Light Up the Track with Our Amphibious LED Remote Control Cars - Easy Direct Charging, Stunt Ready, Interference-Free, Built Tough, Kid-Friendly! 1. Direct charging via USB-C cable , no need to remove the battery again. 2. LED light switch : the stunt car light can be switched on and off, more energy-saving and humanized. 3. Amphibious land and water IP68 fully waterproof adds unlimited fun,Multi-terrain on floors, pavements, grass, sand, swimming pools, ponds. 4. Fun Stunt 180° flips and 360° spins they’re great for beginners and car enthusiasts. 5. Auto Mod e: If you are a beginner, this function allows you to quickly understand all kinds of stunts, easy to start remote control toy car. 6. Sleep mode : more energy-saving, more humanized design rc car. Unique design, 360° rotation This rc stunt car with unique protective cage enables 360° flips and turns without damaging the car. Curved bracket on the back of the car provides excellent support and rolling performance. USB Type-C Direct Charging Built-in 3.7V 600mAh lithium battery, Fast direct charge with USB-C cable without any screw disassembly - Safe and reliable, batteries with overcharge and discharge protection, last long drive time Amphibian Remote Controlled Car Waterproof quality of the car is IP68, which can be used in water. The amphibious properties greatly expand the usability of toys, not only indoors or outdoors, but will also be a unique and creative toy for swimming pools, beaches, snow and lakes. Non-slip and wear resistant tyres Tyres Wrapped with rubber strips, very strong and wear resistant, with long service life Robust Roll Frames Unique design, easy to carry. With the help of this shelf, automatic correction can greatly improve the bad experience of frequent pick-up of the remote controlled car with rollover. Soft LED light LED kühl, erhöhen Sie den Spaß am Fahren der Fernbedienung Spielzeugauto in der Nacht.Dieses Auto kann mit dem Licht an oder aus gefahren werden Waterproof switch The rubber ring is wrapped with a completely waterproof switch design, making the remote controlled car as flexible as a boat when driving in the water
